Tests for flash region erasure and build script for `flash_region` testing on `tintin` platform.


## Files
- **[test_flash_region.c](test_flash_region.c.md)**: Tests for flash region erasure functionality, including sector and subsector operations.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for testing `flash_region` in the `pebble-firmware` on the `tintin` platform.
